paper.title_en: Gauge-Unfixed Hamiltonian Casimir and Static Torsionful Sector in the Katanaev-Volovich Model
paper.abstract_en: Hamiltonian analysis of the first-order Katanaev-Volovich model of two-dimensional gravity with torsion. The first-order action already singles out natural canonical pairs: the auxiliary Lorentz scalars are conjugate to the spatial connection and zweibein. An extended Dirac-Bergmann embedding isolates an auxiliary second-class sector whose elimination recovers the canonical structure encoded in the first-order action and leaves the first-class constraints generating the local gauge symmetries. An independent Faddeev-Jackiw reduction yields the same reduced brackets. The Katanaev/Poisson-Sigma Casimir is then recovered, up to normalization, directly from the reduced Dirac-Bergmann first-class constraint ideal, before imposing any gauge condition. This identifies the Casimir as a global label of the reduced canonical sectors; after the static normalization is chosen, it supplies the Hamiltonian parameter of the torsionful branch. The same normalization is applied to that branch in dilaton gauge, whose field equations are verified on shell. In this static sector the Casimir-normalized radial field does not coincide with the metric Killing norm: the diagonal representative satisfies \(NB=e^{4βr}\). Consequently, torsion modifies the Killing temperature through the normalization of the Killing time, while the horizon entropy retains its standard two-dimensional dilaton value and the Casimir-normalized first law holds.

decision.selection_reason_zh: 该论文涉及带挠率二维引力模型的黑洞热力学，包括Casimir算符、静态挠率扇区以及修正的Killing温度与熵，与黑洞热力学主题高度相关。方法严谨，理论深度高，具有一定新颖性。
decision.title_zh: Katanaev-Volovich模型中规范未固定的哈密顿Casimir与静态挠率扇区
decision.abstract_zh: 对带有挠率的二维引力Katanaev-Volovich模型的一阶哈密顿分析。一阶作用已经挑选出自然的正则对：辅助洛伦兹标量与空间联络和zweibein共轭。扩展的Dirac-Bergmann嵌入隔离了一个辅助的第二类扇区，其消除恢复了一阶作用中编码的正则结构，并保留了生成局部规范对称性的第一类约束。独立的Faddeev-Jackiw约化产生相同的约化括号。然后，在施加任何规范条件之前，直接从约化的Dirac-Bergmann第一类约束理想中恢复Katanaev/Poisson-Sigma Casimir（直到归一化）。这将该Casimir识别为约化正则扇区的全局标签；在选定静态归一化后，它提供了带挠率分支的哈密顿参数。同一归一化应用于膨胀子规范中的该分支，其场方程在壳上得到验证。在该静态扇区中，Casimir归一化的径向场不与度规Killing范数一致：对角代表满足\(NB=e^{4βr}\)。因此，挠率通过Killing时间的归一化修改了Killing温度，而视界熵保持其标准二维膨胀子值，并且Casimir归一化的第一定律成立。
